Superyacht Sunday School Intelligence

Yacht Crew Salary Guide 2026

A polished benchmark view for comparing published yacht crew salaries across roles, departments, and yacht-size bands, with each result clearly attributed to the guide it came from.

Standardized for comparison

Currency toggle is for display only and uses a fixed comparison rate of 1 EUR = 1.10 USD.

View Mode

Choose a role and comparison band to see a blended market benchmark from the guides that match.

Every result still shows the original guide name and published yacht band for clarity.

Salary records

614

Published ranges currently loaded into the guide.

Roles

58

Normalized yacht positions ready to compare.

Sources

10

Industry guides and compensation surveys included.

Size bands

8

Clean comparison bands shown to the client.

Compare Salaries

Choose a role and yacht band

The compare view groups nearby source sizes into simpler client-facing bands.

Quick-start roles

Reading The Data

Every salary range is monthly pay as published by the source guide.

The average shown is the midpoint between each source's minimum and maximum.

The table stays in sync and keeps the original guide band visible on every row.

Current Focus

Pick a role and size band to surface the strongest comparison view and show the exact source cards.

Pick a role to start comparing salary guides

Use the quick-start role chips or the dropdown filters above, then select a comparison band to review the published salary ranges.

Data Sources

Benchmark sources in the guide

Source cards glow when they match the currently selected role and yacht-size band.
